overview: Local Rank Tracker is a local SEO rank tracking tool that maps where your business ranks in Google local search across a geographic grid. Enter a business name, keyword, and location to see your rankings displayed on a real satellite map with color-coded rank indicators pinned at their actual geographic positions.
features: 9-point geographic rank grid with Mapbox satellite aerial map background
Rank indicators pinned at real lat/lng coordinates on the map
Color-coded rank tiers: cyan (1–3), purple (4–10), magenta (11+), grey (not found)
SerpAPI Google Maps integration with fuzzy business name matching
Session persistence — partial scans saved if you leave mid-scan
Dark futuristic 2026 aesthetic with neon glows and glassmorphism
